data.title: Chéticamp long term care workers at Foyer Père Fiset vote 93% in favor of strike mandate for better wages and retention.
data.description: Employees at Foyer Père Fiset Long Term Care Home in Chéticamp, NS, and represented by CUPE 2031, have voted overwhelmingly in favor of a strike mandate at 93%. The primary demands include better wages, as their current rates are the lowest in Atlantic Canada, as well as improvements in recruitment and staff retention. CUPE 2031 President Trevor Poirier expressed the urgency for the government to engage in fair negotiations, emphasizing the need for Nova Scotians to be at the forefront rather than falling behind in terms of labor standards.

data.title: Bitcoin ETF flows are closely watched in digital asset markets, but price doesn't always move in sync. Flows reflect institutional behavior and are reported daily, influencing market demand. However, they don't dictate short-term price direction as institutions accumulate during consolidation. Retail traders must understand these dynamics to position themselves effectively. (Word count: 50)
data.description: Bitcoin spot exchange traded funds have been approved, unlocking institutional capital and reshaping the crypto market. ETF flows have become a crucial data point in digital asset markets, but they do not always align with price movements. Flows represent institutional behavior and show how institutions deploy capital, manage risk, and express conviction in Bitcoin. While ETF flows can impact the underlying market, they do not always dictate short-term price direction. Institutions often accumulate during consolidation periods and reduce exposure during strength, causing divergence between price and flow data. Sustained ETF inflows do not always lead to immediate price increases due to global trading, various factors can mute or delay the price impact of ETF inflows. Understanding this dynamic is crucial for traders looking to anticipate market moves rather than react to headlines.

data.title: Evolution Hospitality takes over management of Balfour Miami Beach, an 82-room boutique hotel in Miami's SoFi neighborhood.
data.description: Evolution Hospitality, a subsidiary of Aimbridge Hospitality known for creating unique lifestyle experiences and achieving top-notch performance, has taken over the management and operations of Balfour Miami Beach. This 82-room boutique hotel, situated in the upscale South of Fifth (“SoFi”) district in Miami Beach, Florida, is part of the Registry Collection Hotels by Wyndham Hotels & Resorts. The property was previously managed by FullG CRE Investments Inc.

data.title: Relay sees 461% growth, ranks #175 on Deloitte Fast 500, #920 on Inc. 5000, adds IPO-veteran leadership to expedite digitalizing physical economy.
data.description: Ranked at #175 on the Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ and #920 on the Inc. 5000, Relay, the Intelligent System of Action, has enhanced its leadership team with experienced IPO veterans. The company, based in Raleigh, N.C., is focused on accelerating the digital transformation of the physical economy through its innovative cloud-based platform.

data.title: IBM updates Qiskit to v2.3, including C API for Quantum-HPC integration, with faster optimization and fault-tolerant tools.
data.description: IBM has recently launched the Qiskit SDK version 2.3, which showcases custom C transpiler passes, accelerated circuit optimization, and tools for early fault-tolerant computing, aiming to aid quantum developers in their work. The latest update includes enhancements to streamline the development process, with a focus on faster processing. This release is significant as it brings improved capabilities to quantum computing, offering advanced tools to developers looking to leverage these technologies.

data.title: Fireblocks handled $6 trillion in stablecoin volume amid 2025 infrastructure expansion, marking 300% YoY growth to reach $200 billion monthly as MoneyGram and WorldRemit embrace blockchain technology.
data.description: Fireblocks reports a significant 300% year-over-year increase in stablecoin growth, reaching a remarkable $200 billion in monthly volume. This surge comes as major remittance companies, MoneyGram and WorldRemit, integrate blockchain technology into their operations.

data.title: Former Olympic snowboarder caught in Mexico for suspected involvement in a criminal network linked to Tether, cocaine, and murder.
data.description: An individual named Ryan James Wedding has been accused of utilizing the stablecoin Tether to support a criminal enterprise involving cocaine smuggling and murder activities across Latin America and the United States.

data.title: Top software solutions for 2025 ranked by Info-Tech Research Group based on verified end-user feedback on business value.
data.description: With organizations experiencing growing scrutiny over their technology investments, the significance of assessing business value has emerged as a key indicator of software success. The 2025 Best Business Value report leverages authentic end-user reviews from Info-Tech Research Group's SoftwareReviews platform to determine top-performing solutions in terms of business value. This comprehensive analysis highlights the importance of evaluating software effectiveness and is based on feedback from a significant number of end-users.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Pleasant Hill, Calif., creates Aftermarket Bandsaw Brake; aims to enhance safety and efficiency.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, a Pleasant Hill, Calif. inventor recently developed an aftermarket bandsaw brake to quickly halt the rotating blade as required. This innovative accessory allows for safe adjustment and debris clearing during operations. The new invention aims to enhance user safety and efficiency when working with bandsaws.

data.title: Croatia's construction industry output to grow 4.8% in 2025 and 2.5% in 2026, driven by investments in renewable energy and transport infrastructure.
data.description: A new report on the Croatia construction market has been released, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The industry in Croatia saw growth of 4.8% in 2025 and is projected to increase by 2.5% in 2026. This growth is attributed to investments from the government in renewable energy and transport infrastructure projects. The report covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets, providing analysis up to 2029.

data.description: Five Point Holdings, LLC, a company specializing in large mixed-use planned communities in California, will be hosting a conference call to review its financial results for the fourth quarter and year-end of 2025. The event is scheduled for 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, January 29, 2026. data.title: UAE's construction industry set to grow by 5.2% in 2025 with 4% AAGR projected till 2029. Increased spending on transport, manufacturing, housing projects driving growth.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report titled "The UAE Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector - Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional and Residential Market Analysis to 2029 (Q4 2025)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's listings. The UAE construction market is projected to expand by 5.2% in real terms by 2025, driven by investments in various sectors like energy and utilities, transportation, and power projects. This growth is further supported by significant government allocations in the industry.

data.title: Anthology's Chapter 11 Plan confirmed by US Bankruptcy Court in Texas, strengthening teaching and learning business.
data.description: Anthology, a prominent SaaS educational technology provider, revealed that the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas has approved the Company's Chapter 11 Plan. This decision paves the way for Anthology to exit Chapter 11 in the near future. The Company is now focused on executing the final phases of its restructuring and strategic changes to emerge successfully.
